task_completion.description: Load sperm whale myoglobin (1A6M) into PyMOL
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL application window is open and displays the 3D structure of myoglobin (an alpha-helical protein).

task_completion.description: Color the structure by SASA values using a color spectrum
task_completion.visual_evidence: The protein structure in the PyMOL viewer is colored using a multi-color spectrum or gradient (e.g., rainbow, b-factor putty) representing surface area, rather than a single solid color or default element colors.

task_completion.description: Save a high-resolution publication figure to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or PyMOL command history shows the file 'myoglobin_sasa.png' being saved or existing in the '~/PyMOL_Data/images/' directory.

task_completion.description: Report the total protein SASA in Angstroms squared
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows 'myoglobin_sasa_report.txt' containing a total SASA value (must be between 5000 and 12000).

task_completion.description: List the 10 most buried residues with number, name, and SASA value
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report contains a list of at least 8 to 10 residues, explicitly showing their residue numbers, residue names, and their corresponding low SASA values.

task_completion.description: Identify which of the buried residues are hydrophobic
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report explicitly labels, groups, or states which of the listed buried residues are hydrophobic.

integrity.description: Agent actually used PyMOL to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the PyMOL GUI or PyMOL command-line interface being actively used to load the molecule and calculate surface area, rather than just searching for the answers online.
A local text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or terminal echo/cat commands are used to write the report, rather than copying a pre-made file.

integrity.description: Files are saved in the exact requested directories
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands or file explorer windows confirm the paths '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/myoglobin_sasa.png' and '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/myoglobin_sasa_report.txt' are used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: PDB ID: 1A6M. The total SASA must be between 5,000 and 12,000 Å² (actual is ~8,063 Å²). The report must list at least 8-10 buried residues. Known buried hydrophobic core residues for this protein include: 10, 29, 33, 43, 68, 75, 89, 104, 107, 115, 138, 142. The figure must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/myoglobin_sasa.png and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/myoglobin_sasa_report.txt.
